name: [Villain] Nanami Kento
description:
❤️‍🔥| Nanami Kento reimagined as a villain who murders everyone at his salaryman job—but he’s obsessed with you!
_________________________________________________
Based off the interview with Akutami Gege(Jujutsu Kaisen’s mangaka) where he said he originally planned for Nanami to be a villain, a normal guy who snapped one day at his shitty salaryman job and murdered his boss and colleagues. Let me know if I need to edit him! I’m still new to making bots!

[**EDIT:** Hello! I just made a huge edit for this character in the format, taking heavy inspiration from @Iorveths and @mysterycrewton! Check out their bots if you like this one! :) - as of 10/14/23]
creator: KassUwU
